information_for_contributors: This file has been converted from https://github.com/MagicStack/MagicPython/blob/master/grammars/MagicPython.tmLanguage
If you want to provide a fix or improvement, please create a pull request against the original repository.
Once accepted there, we are happy to receive an update request.
name: MagicPython

expression-base.comment: valid Python expressions with comments and line continuation

expression-bare.comment: valid Python expressions w/o comments and line continuation

builtin-exceptions.name: support.type.exception.python
builtin-exceptions.match:
(?x) \b(
    (
        Arithmetic | Assertion | Attribute | BlockingIO | BrokenPipe |
        Buffer | ChildProcess | Connection | ConnectionAborted |
        ConnectionRefused | ConnectionReset | EOF | Environment |
        FileExists | FileNotFound | FloatingPoint | IO |
        Import | Indentation | Index | Interrupted | IsADirectory |
        KeyboardInterrupt | Lookup | Memory |
        Name | NotADirectory | NotImplemented | OS | Overflow |
        Permission | ProcessLookup | Recursion | Reference | Runtime |
        StopAsyncIteration | StopIteration | Syntax | System | Tab |
        Timeout | Type | UnboundLocal | Unicode | UnicodeDecodeError |
        UnicodeEncodeError | UnicodeTranslateError | Value | VMS |
        Windows | ZeroDivision
    )Error |
    (
        BytesWarning | DeprecationWarning | FutureWarning | ImportWarning |
        PendingDeprecationWarning | ResourceWarning | RuntimeWarning |
        SyntaxWarning | UnicodeWarning | UserWarning | Warning
    ) |
    (GeneratorExit | KeyboardInterrupt | StopIteration | SystemExit)
)\b

patterns.name: support.function.builtin.python
patterns.match:
(?x)
  (?<!\.) \b(
    __import__ | abs | all | any | apply | ascii | bin | bool | buffer |
    bytearray | bytes | callable | chr | classmethod | cmp | coerce |
    compile | complex | delattr | dict | dir | divmod | enumerate |
    eval | execfile | file | filter | float | format | frozenset |
    getattr | globals | hasattr | hash | help | hex | id | input |
    int | intern | isinstance | issubclass | iter | len | list |
    locals | long | map | max | memoryview | min | next | object |
    oct | open | ord | pow | print | property | range | raw_input |
    reduce | reload | repr | reversed | round | set | setattr | slice |
    sorted | staticmethod | str | sum | super | tuple | type | unichr |
    unicode | vars | xrange | zip
  )\b

builtin-types.name: support.type.python
builtin-types.match:
(?x)
  (?<!\.) \b(
    bool | bytearray | bytes | classmethod | complex | dict |
    float | frozenset | int | list | object | property | set |
    slice | staticmethod | str | tuple | type
  )\b

odd-function-call.comment: function call with only a generator argument

function-call.comment: regular function call of the type "name(args)"
function-call.name: meta.function-call.python

special-names.name: support.variable.special.python
special-names.match:
(?x)
  \b (__) (?:
    name | doc | qualname | module | defaults | code | globals
    | dict | closure | annotations | kwdefaults
  ) (__)\b

illegal-names.name: keyword.control.flow.python
illegal-names.match:
(?x)
  \b(?:
    (
      and | assert | break | class | continue | def |
      del | elif | else | except | exec | finally |
      for | from | global | if | import | in |
      is | lambda | not | or | pass | print |
      raise | return | try | while | with | yield
    ) |
    (
      as | None | True | False | nonlocal
    )
  )\b

fstring-expression.comment: All valid Python expressions, except comments and line continuation

member-access.name: meta.member.access.python
member-access.end:
(?x)
  # stop when you've just read non-whitespace followed by non-word
  # i.e. when finished reading an identifier or function call
  (?<=\S)(?=\W) |
  # stop when seeing the start of something that's not a word,
  # i.e. when seeing a non-identifier
  (^|(?<=\s))(?=[^\\\w\s]) |
  $

illegal-object-name.comment: It's illegal to assign to any of the names that are builtin-constantsor builtin-functions.
illegal-object-name.name: invalid.illegal.name.python
illegal-object-name.match:
(?x)
  \b(?:
    (
        ArithmeticError | AssertionError | AttributeError |
        BaseException | BufferError | BytesWarning | DeprecationWarning |
        EOFError | Ellipsis | EnvironmentError | Exception |
        False | FileNotFoundError | FloatingPointError | FutureWarning |
        GeneratorExit | IOError | ImportError | ImportWarning |
        IndentationError | IndexError | KeyError | KeyboardInterrupt |
        LookupError | MemoryError | NameError | None | NotImplemented |
        NotImplementedError | OSError | OverflowError |
        PendingDeprecationWarning | PermissionError | ProcessLookupError |
        ReferenceError | ResourceWarning | RuntimeError | RuntimeWarning |
        StopIteration | SyntaxError | SyntaxWarning | SystemError |
        SystemExit | TabError | TimeoutError | True | TypeError |
        UnboundLocalError | UnicodeDecodeError | UnicodeEncodeError |
        UnicodeError | UnicodeTranslateError | UnicodeWarning | UserWarning |
        ValueError | Warning | ZeroDivisionError | __builtins__ |
        __debug__ | __doc__ | __import__ | __name__ | __package__ | abs |
        all | any | apply | basestring | bin | bool | buffer |
        bytearray | bytes | callable | chr | classmethod | cmp | coerce |
        compile | complex | copyright | credits | delattr | dict | dir |
        divmod | enumerate | eval | execfile | exit | file | filter |
        float | format | frozenset | getattr | globals | hasattr | hash |
        help | hex | id | input | int | intern | isinstance | issubclass |
        iter | len | license | list | locals | long | map | max |
        memoryview | min | next | object | oct | open | ord | pow | print |
        property | quit | range | raw_input | reduce | reload | repr |
        reversed | round | set | setattr | slice | sorted | staticmethod |
        str | sum | super | tuple | type | unichr | unicode | vars |
        xrange | zip
    ) |
    (
        __all__ | __bases__ | __class__ | __closure__ | __code__ |
        __defaults__ | __dict__ | __file__ | __func__ | __globals__ |
        __locals__ | __module__ | __mro__ | __name__ | __qualname__ |
        __self__ | __slots__ | __weakref__
    )
  )\b

import-from-as-names.begin:
(?x) \b(import) \s+
  (?=
    # Make sure it's not a "x = 3" style assignment
    (?:\s*\()?
    [[:alpha:]_]\w*
    (?:\s*,\s*[[:alpha:]_]\w*)*+
    (?:\s*\))?
    \s*
    (?:$|\#)
  )

decorator.name: meta.function.decorator.python
decorator.end:
(?x)
  ( \) )  # last closing parenthesis
  \s*
  (?=\s*\n)  # followed by a newline
  |
  (?=\n)      # newline
